meta.poznamky: Seřaď 5 bloků: smyčka (čtverec těla) + left(60) + forward(80) + right(120) + forward(80) = střecha (rovnostranný trojúhelník). Start: (120,140) uhel 0.

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]domeček — čtvercové tělo a trojúhelníkovou střechu[/hlp]. Smyčka nakreslí stěny, zbývající bloky přidají střechu.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2" x="300" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2" x="300" y="140"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1" x="20" y="280"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3" x="300" y="280"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1"><field name="ANGLE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
